title: astragalus protectus
intro: Astragalus protectus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to boost the immune system and protect the body from illness. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and enhancing overall well-being. Astragalus protectus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to support its medicinal properties.
